  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BinarySerializer
    Saves and restores the complete simulation state using Java binary serialisation.
    Cell
    Represents a single cell of the simulation grid.
    CellState
    Possible fire states of a grid cell.
    CLI
    Command-line interface for the forest-fire simulation.
    Constants
    Central place for all simulation constants.
    ControlPane
    JavaFX control bar displayed at the bottom of the main window.
    Environment
    Represents the global environmental conditions of the simulation.
    Environment.Season
     
    Environment.Sunlight
     
    FireBehaviour
    Contract that every burnable object in the simulation must fulfil.
    Grid
    Two-dimensional grid of Cell objects that represents the simulation terrain.
    GridCanvas
    JavaFX Canvas that renders the simulation grid.
    GridLoader
    Utility class for generating, saving and loading Grid objects.
    GridStats
    Computes live statistics from the current grid state.
    LegendPane
    JavaFX panel displaying the colour legend for terrain types and fire states.
    Main
    Main entry point of the application.
    MainApp
    JavaFX application entry point.
    MooreSpread
    Fire-spread algorithm based on the Moore neighbourhood: the 8 surrounding cells (4 orthogonal + 4 diagonal).
    OrthogonalSpread
    Fire-spread algorithm that considers only the 4 orthogonal neighbours (North, South, East, West).
    PhysicsFormulas
    Stateless utility class that groups all physical formulas used by the simulation.
    PredefinedTopologies
    Factory class that provides hand-crafted grid topologies for quick scenario testing.
    RadialSpread
    Fire-spread algorithm that considers all cells within a circular radius R.
    SavedState
    Holds the result of a binary load operation.
    SimulationCsvExporter
    Exports a list of SimulationSnapshot objects to a CSV file.
    SimulationSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at a single time step.
    Simulator
    Central controller of the forest-fire simulation.
    SpreadAlgorithm
    Strategy interface for fire-spread algorithms.
    StatsPane
    JavaFX panel showing live simulation statistics.
    TerrainType
    Types of terrain that a grid cell can represent.
    Wind
    Represents the wind: a direction (radians) and a speed normalised to [0.0, MAX_SPEED].
